zh.lifeSummary: 當Margery Danyell於大約1536年出生在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾布爾斯萊姆時，她的父親Thomas Danyell18歲，母親Mrs. Thomas Danyell17歲。她於大約1567年與William Adams在英國斯塔福爾布爾斯萊姆結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她埋葬在英國斯塔福爾布爾斯萊姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margery Danyell于大约1536年出生在英国英格兰斯塔福爾布爾斯萊姆时，她的父亲Thomas Danyell18岁，母亲Mrs. Thomas Danyell17岁。她于大约1567年与William Adams在英国斯塔福爾布爾斯萊姆结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她埋葬在英国斯塔福爾布爾斯萊姆。

nameMeanings.name: Danyell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish (Galway): variant of   Daniel  .

variants.name: Daniel
meanings: English, French, Spanish, Portuguese, German, Polish, Czech, Slovak, Romanian, Jewish, Assyrian/Chaldean, West Indian (mainly Haiti), and African (mainly Nigeria and Tanzania); Breton (rarely Le Daniel); Hungarian (Dániel): from the Biblical personal name Daniel, Syriac (Assyrian/Chaldean) Dānīʾēl, Hungarian Dániel (from Hebrew Daniyyel ‘God is my judge’), borne by a major prophet in the Bible. The chief factor influencing the popularity of the personal name (and hence the frequency of the surname) was undoubtedly the dramatic story in the Book of Daniel recounting the prophet's steadfast adherence to his religious faith despite pressure and persecution from the Mesopotamian kings in whose court he served: Nebuchadnezzar, Belshazzar, and Darius. The name was also borne by a 2nd-century Christian martyr and by a 9th-century hermit, the legend of whose lives were popular among Christians during the Middle Ages. Among Orthodox Christians in Eastern Europe the name was also popular as being that of a 4th-century Persian martyr, who was venerated in the Orthodox Church. In France, this surname is most common in Brittany.

Irish (Tipperary and Waterford): shortened form of McDaniel , which is actually a variant of McDonnell , from the Gaelic form of Irish Donal (equivalent to Scottish Donald), erroneously associated with the Biblical personal name Daniel. See also O'Donnell .
Americanized or Germanized form of Slovenian Danijel: from the Biblical personal name Danijel ‘Daniel’ (see 1 above).

nameMeanings.name: Margery
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual medieval vernacular form of   Margaret   (now also commonly spelled   Marjorie  ). This form of the name is preserved in the nursery rhyme ‘See-saw, Margery Daw’.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

en.lifeSummary: When Margery Danyell was born about 1536, in Burslem, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Thomas Danyell, was 18 and her mother, Mrs. Thomas Danyell, was 17. She married William Adams about 1567, in Burslem, Staffordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. She was buried in Burslem, Staffordshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margery Danyell est née environ 1536, à Burslem, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Thomas Danyell, avait 18 ans et sa mère, Mrs. Thomas Danyell, avait 17 ans. Elle a épousé William Adams environ 1567, à Burslem, Staffordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Elleenterrée à Burslem, Staffordshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margery Danyell um 1536 in Burslem, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Thomas Danyell 18 und ihre Mutter Mrs. Thomas Danyell 17. Sie hat um 1567 in Burslem, Staffordshire, England William Adams geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie wurde in Burslem, Staffordshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margery Danyell è nata il circa 1536 nel Burslem, Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Thomas Danyell, aveva 18 anni e sua madre, Mrs. Thomas Danyell, aveva 17 anni. Lei sposato William Adams circa 1567, nel Burslem, Staffordshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Fu sepolta a Burslem, Staffordshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Margery Danyellが約1536年にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアブルスレムで生まれた時，父Thomas Danyellは18歳，母Mrs. Thomas Danyellは17歳であった。約1567年にイギリススタフォードシュアイアブルスレムでWilliam Adamsと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女はイギリススタフォードシュアイアブルスレムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Margery Danyell(이)가 대략 1536년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 버슬렘에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas Danyell(은)는 18세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mrs. Thomas Danyell(은)는 17세였다. 그녀는 대략 1567년 영국 스태퍼드실르 버슬렘에서 William Adams(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 영국 스태퍼드실르 버슬렘에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margery Danyell nasceu aproximadamente 1536, em Burslem, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Thomas Danyell, tinha 18 anos e sua mãe, Mrs. Thomas Danyell, tinha 17 anos. Ela casou-se com William Adams aproximadamente 1567, em Burslem, Staffordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela foi sepultada em Burslem, Staffordshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margery Danyell родилась около 1536 г. в местности бурслем, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Thomas Danyell было 18 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs. Thomas Danyell, 17. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Adams около 1567 г. в местности бурслем, стаффордшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Она была похоронена в местности бурслем, стаффордшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margery Danyell nació aproximadamente 1536, en Burslem, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Thomas Danyell, tenía 18 años y su mamá, Mrs. Thomas Danyell, tenía 17 años. Se casó con William Adams aproximadamente 1567, en Burslem, Staffordshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas. Fue sepultada en Burslem, Staffordshire, Inglaterra.
